scenes.text:
A diamond is just a piece of
coal that handled pressure exceptionally well.

Pressure is not your enemy. It is your trainer. The situations that feel like they are crushing you are actually shaping you. Every
rejection hardens your skin. Every failure sharpens your strategy. Every setback strengthens your resolve. You are not breaking. You are being forged.

The next time life puts you under pressure, do not crack. Compress.
Get denser. Get stronger. Get more brilliant. That is what diamonds do.

Pressure is a privilege. It means you
are doing something worth being tested for.

What pressure is shaping you right now?
Share below. Follow for strength daily.
